idea: Grocery Store Foot Traffic Collapse Signal

data.source: Google Trends weekly search volume for 'grocery delivery' and 'food bank near me' through google_trends adapter

behavior: Spikes in grocery delivery and food bank searches often precede consumer spending contractions and indicate financial strain or shift to online shopping channels.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary retail faces headwinds when food insecurity searches spike; signals demand destruction in consumer staples and discretionary spending.

trade_logic.entry: When 'grocery delivery' + 'food bank' combined search interest exceeds 75th percentile of 52-week rolling average
trade_logic.exit: After 10 trading days or when combined search interest falls below 50th percentile

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Consumer stress proxies fire monthly; grocery delivery searches spike during economic uncertainty windows which recur seasonally and cyclically.

data.source: Google Trends weekly search volume for 'rental car prices' and 'car rental shortage' through google_trends adapter

behavior: Spikes in rental car availability/pricing searches correlate with tight vehicle supply, rising leisure travel demand, or fleet disruptions—both inflationary and demand signals.

market_impact.rationale: High rental car search volume suggests strong leisure travel demand; signals consumer confidence and discretionary spending willingness.

trade_logic.entry: When 'rental car prices' OR 'car rental shortage' search volume exceeds 70th percentile of 26-week rolling baseline
trade_logic.exit: After 7 trading days or when search volume normalizes below 55th percentile

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal travel demand, holiday planning, and summer leisure travel create recurring rental car search spikes every 3–4 weeks.

data.source: FRED series ICSA (Initial Claims, weekly) through fred_series adapter

behavior: When initial jobless claims spike above 2-week moving average by >10%, it signals near-term labor market stress and often precedes equity volatility.

market_impact.rationale: Claims spikes pressure financial sector credit quality and loan loss provisions; weakness in financial stocks often leads broader selloffs.

trade_logic.entry: When ICSA exceeds its 2-week SMA by ≥10% and closes above prior week's high
trade_logic.exit: After 5 trading days or when ICSA reverts below 1.05× 2-week SMA

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly claims data ensures signal recurrence; seasonal layoffs and economic cycles produce 2–3 spike events per month on average.

data.source: Port of Shanghai weekly container export volumes and backlog through port_container_volume adapter (public shipping indices)

behavior: Elevated container backlogs in major Asian ports signal supply chain tightness and rising freight costs, inflating input prices for manufacturing and retail.

market_impact.rationale: Manufacturing sector faces margin compression from elevated logistics costs; industrials are most exposed to freight cost pass-through friction.

trade_logic.entry: When Shanghai port weekly export backlog exceeds 90th percentile of 52-week rolling history
trade_logic.exit: After 10 trading days or when backlog normalizes below 70th percentile

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal shipping surges (Chinese New Year, holiday inventory builds) and port congestion recur predictably; 2–3 backlog spikes per quarter.

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily Bitcoin and Ethereum volatility (price_only adapter) + Google Trends crypto liquidation mentions through google_trends adapter

behavior: When crypto price drawdowns exceed 15% weekly AND liquidation search volume spikes, it signals forced selling, margin calls, and contagion risk to tech/growth.

market_impact.rationale: Tech and fintech firms are exposed to crypto ecosystem; crypto crashes precede tech volatility and venture funding contraction.

trade_logic.entry: When Bitcoin weekly drawdown >15% AND 'crypto liquidation' search interest exceeds 80th percentile of 13-week rolling average
trade_logic.exit: After 3 trading days or when Bitcoin recovers >8% from entry signal

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Crypto volatility clusters; 15% weekly drawdowns occur 3–4 times per quarter, and liquidation spikes follow predictably within 48 hours.

data.source: Open-Meteo daily average temperature anomalies for US and Europe through weather_series adapter

behavior: When temperature deviation from 30-year normal exceeds ±2 standard deviations for 3+ consecutive days, it forces emergency energy demand swings and utility margin pressure.

market_impact.rationale: Utilities face volume-price mismatches during extreme weather; margin compression and regulatory backlash pressure utility sector equity returns.

trade_logic.entry: When daily US temperature anomaly ≥2σ from historical median AND persists for ≥3 consecutive days
trade_logic.exit: After 5 trading days or when temperature normalizes to within 1σ

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal heat waves and cold snaps occur predictably; 2–3 extreme temperature events per month during summer/winter transitions.

data.source: USGS earthquake activity (magnitude ≥4.5) by region through earthquake_activity adapter

behavior: Clusters of moderate earthquakes (M4.5+) in major construction zones halt projects, disrupt supply chains, and create insurance/liability spikes in affected regions.

market_impact.rationale: Building materials demand falls during seismic event construction halts; project delays inflate materials inventory and reduce near-term demand.

trade_logic.entry: When 2+ earthquakes M≥4.5 occur within same tectonic region within 48 hours
trade_logic.exit: After 7 trading days or when seismic activity subsides (<1 event per week in region)

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake clusters are non-uniform but frequent; California/Japan/Chile produce 2–4 M4.5+ clusters per month on average.

data.source: OpenChargeMap daily EV charger counts by state/region through openchargemap adapter

behavior: Rapid week-over-week growth in EV charger deployments (>5% WoW) signals infrastructure buildout completion and maturation—near-term EV demand plateau.

market_impact.rationale: EV charger saturation signals slowing capex spending on charging; tech companies and EV suppliers face slower order flow.

trade_logic.entry: When weekly EV charger net additions exceed prior 4-week average by ≥25%
trade_logic.exit: After 8 trading days or when weekly charger additions fall below 2-week moving average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal infrastructure spending (spring/summer buildout) creates recurring charger installation spikes; 2–4 high-growth weeks per quarter.

data.source: RSS feed (Bloomberg/Reuters/CNBC) daily article count mentioning 'recession' AND 'earnings miss' through rss_count adapter

behavior: When combined recession + earnings miss mentions spike to 90th percentile, sentiment capitulation is near; market contrarian reversal opportunity follows within 3–5 days.

market_impact.rationale: Extreme negative sentiment clustering often marks washout phase; consumer discretionary rebounds as capitulation exhausts.

trade_logic.entry: When combined daily RSS count (recession + earnings miss) exceeds 85th percentile of 52-week rolling distribution
trade_logic.exit: After 4 trading days or when RSS count reverts to 50th percentile

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earnings seasons and recession narratives cycle; 2–3 sentiment spikes per month during earnings windows and Fed announcement clusters.

idea: Healthcare Cost Shock Google Search Spike

data.source: Google Trends weekly search volume for 'medical debt' and 'prescription drug cost' through google_trends adapter

behavior: Spikes in healthcare cost-related searches signal consumer financial strain and pressure on healthcare utilization; precedes healthcare sector demand pullback.

market_impact.rationale: Rising search interest in medical debt and prescription costs signals demand elasticity; healthcare equity valuations compress on utilization concerns.

trade_logic.entry: When 'medical debt' + 'prescription drug cost' combined search interest exceeds 72nd percentile of 26-week rolling baseline
trade_logic.exit: After 6 trading days or when combined search interest falls below 50th percentile

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Insurance deductible resets (Jan), drug price negotiations, and benefits season (Nov) create 2–3 cost-shock search spikes per quarter.
